reviews.comment:
Un poco trabado, sin lugar de para espera, tenes que estar mal estacionado si hay 1 solo auto en el surtidor. Buena atención

(Translated by Google)
A bit congested, no waiting area, you have to be badly parked if there's only one car at the pump. Good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURndUl1aktBEAE

reviews.comment:
Atienden muy bien, pero a las 21:45 de un viernes 1 sola isla abierta de 5. Increíble

(Translated by Google)
The service is great, but at 9:45 pm on a Friday, only 1 out of 5 islands was open. Unbelievable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURnNFBLYVFREAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención del playero, pero demasiado milico el que ordena el tránsito/
estacionamiento.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendant was good, but the person directing traffic/parking was too much of a cop.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNncmZYZTFRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Si vas a cargar aca, armate de muuuucha paciencia... son de terror
La peor estacion de servicio q conozco, nunca tardas menos de 30 min, vivo enfrente y cada vez q cargo aca me arrepiento y juro no volver. Lo hacen a proposito

(Translated by Google)
If you're going to fill up here, arm yourself with a looooot of patience... they're a nightmare. The worst gas station I know; you never wait less than 30 minutes. I live across the street, and every time I fill up here, I regret it and swear I'll never come back. They do it on purpose.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURYOHFyQnRnRRAB
